bead.title: refactor(svelte): fix ui-primitives demo showing mode as [object Object]
bead.description:
Opus Stage 3 batch review (2026-04-15): src/routes/demo/ui-primitives/+page.svelte:26 renders {mode} as '[object Object]'. NavShell correctly uses mode.current. The demo page wasn't updated to match the mode-watcher Svelte 5 API.

Fix: change {mode} to {mode.current} or {$mode} depending on whether it's a rune or legacy store binding.
bead.acceptance: (1) ui-primitives demo page renders the current mode name as a readable string ('light' / 'dark' / 'system'). (2) bun run check green.
